fact_nuggets.text: Sand Spit (Japanese: Sand Spit) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Silicobra and Sandaconda.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Sand Spit summons a sandstorm in battle for five turns when a Pokemon with Sand Spit is hit by a damaging move, unless a sandstorm is already present. This can be extended to eight turns if the Pokemon is holding a Smooth Rock . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Sand Spit has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Sand Spit summons a sandstorm in battle for five turns when a Pokemon with Sand Spit is hit by a damaging move, unless a sandstorm is already present. This can be extended to eight turns if the Pokemon is holding a Smooth Rock .
Creates a sandstorm when hit by an attack.
